nodes.label: Call gtk_window_get_screen()
nodes.detail: #ifdef GDK_WINDOWING_X11 GdkScreen* screen = gtk_window_get_screen(window); if (GDK_IS_X11_SCREEN(screen)) { const gchar* wm_name = gdk_x11_screen_get_window_manager_name(screen); if (g_strcmp0(wm_name, "GNOME Shell") != 0) { use_header_bar = FALSE; } } #endif

nodes.label: Handle internal condition: use_header_bar
nodes.detail: if (use_header_bar) { GtkHeaderBar* header_bar = GTK_HEADER_BAR(gtk_header_bar_new()); gtk_widget_show(GTK_WIDGET(header_bar)); gtk_header_bar_set_title(header_bar, "flutter_chat"); gtk_header_bar_set_show_close_button(header_bar, TRUE); gtk_window_set_titlebar(window, GTK_WIDGET(header_bar)); } else { gtk_window_set_title(window, "flutter_chat"); }
